citations.quote: 1 attachment (3 MB) MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf;
This email contains a copy of the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct please have a thorough read through before we request you electronically sign the tenancy agreement

findings.text: Email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra dated 12/03/2026 attaches a file named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).
The email states it contains a copy of the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct and instructs the recipient to read before signing.
The attached Student Licence PDF was not extracted in this context; binary extraction tool was not available.

proposed_artifacts.content: The email NAP-SRC-0029 references an attached Student Licence PDF (3 MB) that was not extracted. The binary extraction tool was not available in this context. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded PDF using a binary extraction tool.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction Report for NAP-SRC-0029 Student Licence PDF

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach, binwalk, or custom script) to extract the embedded 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the source file NAP-SRC-0029. The source file is located at 01-sources/communications/NAP-SRC-0029 - Email - Elbushra, Anfal - Outlook.pdf. Save the extracted PDF as a candidate artifact and extract its text content.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0029 using binary extraction tool

risk_flags.text: Missing extraction of the Student Licence PDF may result in incomplete evidence of the tenancy agreement terms.

summary: Extracted text from NAP-SRC-0029 shows an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra attaching a 'Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB). The email references a Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct but the attached PDF was not extracted. The binary extraction tool was not available in this context. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded PDF using a binary extraction tool.

uncertainties.text: The content of the embedded Student Licence PDF is unknown; it may contain the full tenancy terms and conditions.
